description: Raw observations about the project collected during work sessions

observations.observation: 9-agent system uses a hierarchical coordination model with CEO at the top. Changes to CEO prompt cascade to all 8 downstream agents.
SDR agents (07-09) have 1h heartbeats making them the highest-frequency and therefore highest-cost agents. They are the first place to look when optimizing costs.

The system uses kimi-k2.5 via OpenRouter as the sole model. All agents share the same model, keeping the architecture simple but creating a single point of failure if OpenRouter or kimi-k2.5 goes down.
